title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that programming language choice has outsized impact on AI development workflows and team velocity. The video recommends TypeScript over Python for AI coding due to better static type checking, LSP support, and error detection mechanisms that catch mistakes early, especially as team size increases.
